response.justification: Candidate is a skilled senior/staff-level full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and strong craftsmanship values, but the role targets a Director-level individual contributor with 15+ years and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows ~14-16 years of experience with only recent, light exposure to AI/MCP tooling, no demonstrated AI products at scale, no advanced degree, and no track record advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption at the principal/director level.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source contributions
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow tooling
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale required for a Principal/Director IC role
Lacks experience advising strategic enterprise customers and shaping cloud/AI product strategy
No advanced degree in AI and limited demonstrable cloud-platform leadership (AWS CDK exposure only)

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI strategy and product leadership track record
Seniority/scope mismatch vs. Director-level IC expectations
Emerging AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
